title: strateuomai #4754
definition:
1) to make a military expedition, to lead soldiers to war or to
    battle, (spoken of a commander)
 2) to do military duty, be on active service, be a soldier
 3) to fight
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to make a military expedition, to lead soldiers to war or to
    battle, (spoken of a commander)
 2) to do military duty, be on active service, be a soldier
 3) to fight

    NASB:  to make war, hence to serve as a soldier:
